sourceOfTruth: ts/packages/renderer-host/src/index.ts plus @asha/render-projection and generated @asha/contracts render DTOs
failClosedPolicy: Consumers must fail closed if the renderer host compatibility marker is unknown or if the host cannot mount a backend-neutral ASHA render surface.
pinningGuidance: Record ASHA git commit plus renderer-host.v0 in downstream demo compatibility artifacts.
breakingChangeRequires: consumer boundary review if allowed roles change
demo migration notes when backend package exposure changes
